src/main.jsx.purpose: App bootstrap. Imports global styles and i18n and mounts <App/>.
src/main.jsx.editNotes: Rarely changed. If changing render root or StrictMode, verify HMR and root element ID.

src/App.jsx.purpose: Top-level routing and navigation. Defines routes and sidebar menus.
src/App.jsx.editNotes: Changes here impact navigation and route wiring. Add new pages by importing and adding Routes and navigation entries. Keep translation keys for menu labels in sync with i18n.js.

src/i18n.js.purpose: Central translations for FR/EN/AR and i18next initialization.
src/i18n.js.editNotes: Add keys in all language objects simultaneously. Changing fallbackLng or detection affects app language selection. Arabic requires RTL handling in App/GeneralSettings pages.

src/services/api.js.purpose: Encapsulates all backend interactions (REST fetch calls).
src/services/api.js.editNotes: If endpoint shapes change, update callers. API methods return JSON or throw; errors often bubble up to UI where Dialogs are used. Avoid changing method names without updating consumers.

src/components/Dialog.jsx.purpose: Modal dialog and Toast components used across app for confirmations and messages.
src/components/Dialog.jsx.editNotes: Used everywhere; keep API stable. Changing text or structure requires updating calls providing confirmText/cancelText.

src/pages/Dashboard.jsx.purpose: Displays site stats, charts, and recent devices. Fetches /api/statistics and respects sync_enabled via GET /api/settings/general.
src/pages/Dashboard.jsx.editNotes: Avoid heavy DOM updates on auto-refresh. Manual refresh button triggers fetchStats(true) which shows loading.

src/pages/GeneralSettings.jsx.purpose: Manage system-level settings: language, timezone, and sync settings (sync_enabled, sync_interval_sec, require_sync_confirmation, validate_timestamps).
src/pages/GeneralSettings.jsx.editNotes: This is single source for user-controlled global flags. Changing state shape requires updating Dashboard and DeviceSettings where these settings are read.

src/pages/DeviceSettings.jsx.purpose: CRUD for devices, discovery, and sync operations (employees and attendance). Uses many API methods: getDevices, addDevice, updateDevice, deleteDevice, discoverDevice, syncEmployeesFromDevice, syncAttendanceFromDevice, confirmEmployeeSync, confirmAttendanceSync.
src/pages/DeviceSettings.jsx.editNotes: Complex page; edits here affect device sync flows. Keep confirmation logic aligned with GeneralSettings.require_sync_confirmation. When adding new sync behavior, modify api.js then DeviceSettings handlers.

src/pages/CompanyConfig.jsx.purpose: Manage companies, hierarchical departments, and positions. Renders organization hierarchy and table views.
src/pages/CompanyConfig.jsx.editNotes: Department hierarchy logic is sensitive; changes to department shape (parent_id/company_id fields) require tree-building updates. Many labels use i18n keys added during prior refactor.

src/pages/ShiftManagement.jsx.purpose: Manage shifts and their metadata. Uses getShifts, createShift, updateShift, deleteShift (api methods must exist).
src/pages/ShiftManagement.jsx.editNotes: Modal flows and dialog confirmations; if adding shift timings storage, coordinate backend API changes and update loadShifts.

src/pages/HolidayCalendar.jsx.purpose: View and manage holidays per year and month. Uses api.getHolidaysByYear, createHoliday, updateHoliday, deleteHoliday.
src/pages/HolidayCalendar.jsx.editNotes: Calendar rendering is UI-heavy; keep date formats consistent with backend (YYYY-MM-DD).

src/pages/BulkShiftAssignment.jsx.purpose: Assign shifts to many employees at once. Uses getEmployees, getShifts, createBulkAssignment endpoints.
src/pages/BulkShiftAssignment.jsx.editNotes: Batch operations should have safeguards (preview, dry-run). Backend expects arrays and may return per-row errors; surface them in UI.

src/pages/EmployeeManagement.jsx.purpose: Full employee CRUD, filters, and per-employee current shift fetches.
src/pages/EmployeeManagement.jsx.editNotes: Large file. When changing employee fields, update i18n keys and validation in forms. Device sync warnings are surfaced via error payloads.

src/pages/AttendanceFilter.jsx.purpose: Filter and edit attendance records. Uses getAttendanceFiltered, updateAttendance, deleteAttendance.
src/pages/AttendanceFilter.jsx.editNotes: Export functionality is TODO. Editing records calls updateAttendance with timestamp + status. Ensure date/time formatting matches backend expectations.

src/pages/AttendanceToday.jsx.purpose: Shows today's attendance (fast view). Uses getTodayAttendance.

globalNotes.i18nBestPractice: Add new translation keys to all language sections in src/i18n.js. Use t('key') everywhere. Avoid embedding literals.
globalNotes.apiSafety: Prefer adding new ApiService methods when endpoints change. Keep method names stable to make refactors easier.
globalNotes.componentSafety: Use small commits. If modifying shared components (Dialog, Toast), run the app and exercise flows that use them.
recommendedWorkflow: Run dev server: cd frontend; npm install; npm run dev
Manually test affected pages and adjacent pages
Push branch and open a PR
